name: Fore Play Simulators
address: 601 Orange Dr Suite G, Vacaville, CA 95687
about: Fore Play Simulators is an indoor golf and entertainment venue in Vacaville, featuring four high-tech golf simulator bays. The facility offers play on over 160 world-class courses with auto-tee systems and provides detailed feedback, including advanced practice apps and mini-games. It also includes a pinball arcade and a bar serving beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic options. Bay rentals are available by the hour, with rates varying by day, and the venue offers personalized golf instruction from PGA professionals for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Auto-tee system eliminates bending over for a seamless golf experience
High-tech simulators provide more feedback than traditional driving ranges
Variety of practice apps and mini-games for targeted skill improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No food mentioned on the website
Bar with beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic options available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice for players to bring their own clubs to golf simulator venues.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a bar with beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic options, but does not mention if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One player can complete a full 18 holes with a warm-up in one hour. A group of 4 players typically takes just under 4 hours for a full 18.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Fore Play Simulators is described as a family-friendly sporting events center, offering pinball machines and coaching for golfers of all ages.
